description.en: Get detailed information about an album on Spotify, including its tracks.
description.de: Erhalte detaillierte Informationen über ein Album auf Spotify, einschließlich seiner Tracks.
description.es: Obtén información detallada sobre un álbum en Spotify, incluidas sus pistas.
description.fr: Obtenez des informations détaillées sur un album sur Spotify, y compris ses morceaux.
description.ro: Obțineți informații detaliate despre un album pe Spotify, inclusiv melodiile acestuia.
description.it: Ottieni informazioni dettagliate su un album su Spotify, comprese le sue tracce.

vars.ACCESS_TOKEN: env:SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN|OAuth access token from Spotify Developer Dashboard.

inputs.name: Album ID

description.en: The Spotify ID for the album.
description.es: El ID de Spotify del álbum.

inputs.bot: The Spotify album ID. You can get this from search results or a Spotify URL.
